TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.title: Live: Roland Garros 360
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Day 1-Day Session
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Coverage from around the courts on day one of the Grand Slam tournament, featuring first-round matches at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. America's Coco Gauff won the women's singles title a year ago thanks to a 7-6, 2-6, 4-6 victory over Belarus' Aryna Sabalenka in the final. Gauff beat the likes of Lois Boisson, Ekaterina Alexandrova and fellow American Madison Keys to reach the showpiece, while Sabalenka beat Iga Swiatek, Elina Svitolina and Amanda Anisimova to set up the clash with Gauff.

TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.title: Live: Roland Garros 360
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Day 1-Evening Session
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Further coverage from around the courts on day one of the Grand Slam tournament, featuring first-round matches at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. Spain's Carlos Alcaraz won the men's singles title here 12 months ago after beating Jannik Sinner in a thrilling final. Sinner had taken the first two sets before Alcaraz fought back to eventually win the showpiece 6-4, 7-6, 4-6, 6-7, 6-7 in a game that lasted just short of five and a half hours.

TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.title: Live: Roland Garros 360
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.subtitle: Day 1-Day Session
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.description: Coverage from around the courts on day one of the Grand Slam tournament, featuring first-round matches at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. America's Coco Gauff won the women's singles title a year ago thanks to a 7-6, 2-6, 4-6 victory over Belarus' Aryna Sabalenka in the final. Gauff beat the likes of Lois Boisson, Ekaterina Alexandrova and fellow American Madison Keys to reach the showpiece, while Sabalenka beat Iga Swiatek, Elina Svitolina and Amanda Anisimova to set up the clash with Gauff.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Live: Inside the NBA
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: This Emmy Award-winning studio show, which airs following NBA telecasts on ESPN, is hosted by Ernie Johnson, with analysis from Hall of Famer Charles Barkley and NBA champions Kenny Smith and Shaquille O'Neal. It's a mix of highlights, interviews and hijinks, notably the verbal sparring sessions between the outspoken Barkley and his straight man, Smith. The show also welcomes various guest analysts throughout the season.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

Award-winning program anchored by David Muir, featuring unforgettable, character-driven true crime mysteries, exclusive newsmaker interviews, hard-hitting investigative reports and in-depth coverage of high profile stories.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Mark, Bonnie, Sarah and Nippy strategize with Catherine Oxenberg about how to get her daughter, India, out of DOS, even though she wants to stay; "Jane," India's close friend, describes the appeal of the organization and why she left it all behind.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Class 1 Data
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Catherine believes her daughter is in danger and wants her to come home; when she and the former members are unable to get the attention of the authorities, they approach the New York Times; Mark reflects on his time at NXIVM.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Honesty & Disclosure
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Sarah, Mark and Nippy contact additional news outlets to provoke outrage and pressure law enforcement to pay attention; Barbara Bouchey, a former board member and early defector, reflects on her time in Keith's inner circle.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The Dossier
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Catherine meets with Frank Parlato to build a dossier of evidence for the New York Attorney General's office.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The Wound
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: As the group prepares to testify to the FBI, it reflects on its beliefs regarding the SOP and JNESS curriculums.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The Fall
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Keith hasn't been seen in Clifton Park, N.Y., for weeks; Catherine meets with India; Mark and Bonnie return to Clifton Park for the first time since leaving NXIVM; Sarah, Bonnie, Mark, Nippy and Catherine face a development in the case.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Tests of Loyalty
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Prosecutor Moira Penza and defense attorney Marc Agnifilo prepare for trial after the arrests; Nicki Clyne and Michele Hatchette offer a different perspective into NXIVM; Nancy Salzman, under house arrest, sits down for an interview.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Rapport
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Nancy Salzman looks back at her professional and personal relationship with Keith Raniere and defends her intentions with the company to help people achieve lasting, personal growth; the first witnesses are called to the stand.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Stimulus and Response
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Marc Agnifilo presents his case for the good work of NXIVM; Marc Elliot remains loyal to Keith Raniere after he claims the symptoms of his Tourette's syndrome were reduced by Nancy Salzman; Lauren Salzman takes the stand for the prosecution.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The Breach
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Lauren Salzman testifies to decades of manipulation at the hands of Keith Raniere; NXIVM supporters are unconvinced by the evidence presented; Nancy Salzman grapples with learning the extent of Raniere's sexual pursuit of both of her daughters.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The Room
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A witness for the prosecution gives testimony about how Keith Raniere groomed her from a very young age and describes the coercive abuse she suffered at his hands; the trial concludes and all await the verdict.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Vow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Crime and Punishment
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Keith Raniere is found guilty on all charges; he is sentenced to 120 years; his supporters work to exonerate him, and he plans to appeal; Nancy Salzman comes to a painful reckoning; she is sentenced to 42 months in federal prison.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Weapons
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The End Of Wondering
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: APD cold case detective Dan Jackson reveals the behind-the-scenes details of the painstaking work that he and other investigators used in tracking down the killer of four teenage girls in Austin, Texas in 1991.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Stand Still and See
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Maybe every mistake Rue made led her to the right place after all.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Niall and Ava face major life changes as Ruben struggles with his relationship; An impulsive choice between Mona and Niall has serious consequences for all involved.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Joker
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Stand Still and See
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Maybe every mistake Rue made led her to the right place after all.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Legend of Ochi
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In a remote village on the island of Carpathia, a shy farm girl named Yuri is raised to fear elusive animals known as ochi. But when Yuri discovers a wounded baby ochi has been left behind, she escapes on a quest to bring him home.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Paddington 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Flow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Smoking Tigers
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: 38 at the Garden
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Point guard Jeremy Lin, an undrafted Harvard graduate, shocks fans, stuns his teammates and galvanizes Asians around the world during his landmark 2011-12 season with the New York Knicks and sparks the "Linsanity" craze.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander, also known as the AANHPI, communities in America.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: AKA Mr. Chow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Michael Chow overcomes childhood trauma, personal loss and systemic prejudice to become an actor, artist and restaurateur.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Lola Versus
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Just three weeks before her wedding, Lola (Greta Gerwig) finds herself suddenly without a partner when her longtime fiancé, Luke (Joel Kinnaman), dumps her. With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Twister
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Insidious: The Last Key
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Brilliant parapsychologist Elise Rainier receives a disturbing phone call from a man who claims that his house is haunted. Even more disturbing is the address -- 413 Apple Tree Lane in Five Keys, N.M. -- the home where Elise grew up as a child. Accompanied by her two investigative partners, Rainier travels to Five Keys to confront and destroy her greatest fear -- the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Insidious
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Insidious: The Red Door
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Curse of La Llorona
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In the 1970s Los Angeles, the legendary ghost La Llorona is stalking the night -- and the children. Ignoring the eerie warning of a troubled mother, a social worker and her own kids are drawn into a frightening supernatural realm. Their only hope of surviving La Llorona's deadly wrath is a disillusioned priest who practices mysticism to keep evil at bay.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The End Of Wondering
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: APD cold case detective Dan Jackson reveals the behind-the-scenes details of the painstaking work that he and other investigators used in tracking down the killer of four teenage girls in Austin, Texas in 1991.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Niall and Ava face major life changes as Ruben struggles with his relationship; An impulsive choice between Mona and Niall has serious consequences for all involved.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Mummy Returns
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Twilight
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Bride of Frankenstein
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Victor Frankenstein is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe, with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Frankenstein 1970
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

HBO.West.us2.description: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

HBO.West.us2.title: Uncut Gems
HBO.West.us2.description: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

HBO.West.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.West.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.West.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.West.us2.description: Comedian/writer John Oliver satirically examines events in Season 13.

HBO.West.us2.description: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

HBO.West.us2.subtitle: Fire and Water
HBO.West.us2.description: In 1991, the murder of four teenage girls rocks the city of Austin; a lack of hard evidence soon thwarts the investigation.

HBO.West.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.West.us2.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
HBO.West.us2.description: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

HBO.West.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.West.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.West.us2.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
HBO.West.us2.description: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Bride!
HBO.West.us2.description: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Brett Goldstein: The Second Best Night of Your Life

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Caleb Hearon: Model Comedian
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Caleb Hearon's first stand-up comedy special at Chicago's Constellation; it features him dissecting life's absurdities with charm and wit before a packed house.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Friendship
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: One Battle After Another
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: MacGruber
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Atsuko Okatsuka: The Intruder
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic-actor dishes on the futile art of impressing teenagers, attending a "Magic Mike Live" show with her grandmother, and the alarming reactions that she and her husband had to the unwanted presence of an intruder.

Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Paddington 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. NBC.East.Stream.us2.title: Open House
NBC.East.Stream.us2.description: Buying a house can be a stressful, time-consuming process, which is why people turn to shows such as "Open House" to get help in the real estate market. Hosts Sara Gore and George Oliphant (who also rescues homeowners' renovation projects on sister show "George to the Rescue," which began as a segment of "Open House" before becoming a stand-alone show) showcase some of the hottest homes on the market in major cities, get interior design tips from experts and provide information on what people need to know about stylish living.

CBS.Sports.Network.HD.us2.title: Time to Schein

It's also prepared him for his dream job -- "Time to Schein," a national weekday series on CBS Sports Network. In a fast-moving, unscripted format, the host presents his unique perspective on the latest news and social media trends, provides bold predictions and interacts with key players, personalities and league personnel. Schein also hosts "That Other Pregame Show" and "NFL Monday QB" on CBS Sports Network during the NFL season.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Harry Potter's third year at Hogwarts starts off badly when he learns deranged killer Sirius Black has escaped from Azkaban prison and is bent on murdering the teenage wizard. While Hermione's cat torments Ron's sickly rat, causing a rift among the trio, a swarm of nasty Dementors is sent to protect the school from Black. A mysterious new teacher helps Harry learn to defend himself, but what is his secret tie to Sirius Black?

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Adaptation of the first of J.K. Rowling's popular children's novels about Harry Potter, a boy who learns on his eleventh birthday that he is the orphaned son of two powerful wizards and possesses unique magical powers of his own. He is summoned from his life as an unwanted child to become a student at Hogwarts, an English boarding school for wizards. There, he meets several friends who become his closest allies and help him discover the truth about his parents' mysterious deaths.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Now in his fifth year at Hogwarts, Harry learns that many in the wizarding community do not know the truth of his encounter with Lord Voldemort. Cornelius Fudge, Minister of Magic, appoints his toady, Dolores Umbridge, as Defense Against the Dark Arts teacher, for he fears that professor Dumbledore will take his job. But her teaching is deficient and her methods, cruel, so Harry prepares a group of students to defend the school against a rising tide of evil.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: As Death Eaters wreak havoc in both Muggle and Wizard worlds, Hogwarts is no longer a safe haven for students. Though Harry suspects there are new dangers lurking within the castle walls, Dumbledore is more intent than ever on preparing the young wizard for the final battle with Voldemort. Teenage hormones run rampant through Hogwarts, presenting a different sort of danger. Love may be in the air, but tragedy looms and Hogwarts may never be the same again.

USA.Network.HD.us2.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1
USA.Network.HD.us2.description: Without the guidance and protection of their professors, Harry (Daniel Radcliffe), Ron (Rupert Grint) and Hermione (Emma Watson) begin a mission to destroy the Horcruxes, the sources of Voldemort's immortality. Though they must rely on one another more than ever, dark forces threaten to tear them apart. Voldemort's Death Eaters have seized control of the Ministry of Magic and Hogwarts, and they are searching for Harry -- even as he and his friends prepare for the ultimate showdown.

Teaming up with a street-savvy electrician named Zeus Carver (Samuel L. Jackson), McClane dashes through the city, trying to stay one step ahead of a murderous plot.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rocky
AMC.HD.us2.description: Rocky Balboa (Sylvester Stallone), a small-time boxer from working-class Philadelphia, is arbitrarily chosen to take on the reigning world heavyweight champion, Apollo Creed (Carl Weathers), when the undefeated fighter's scheduled opponent is injured. While training with feisty former bantamweight contender Mickey Goldmill (Burgess Meredith), Rocky tentatively begins a relationship with Adrian (Talia Shire), the wallflower sister of his meat-packer pal Paulie (Burt Young).

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rocky II
AMC.HD.us2.description: Although working-class Philadelphia boxer Rocky Balboa lost his high-profile bout with the cocky world champion Apollo Creed, his Cinderella story has caught the national sports media's attention, and he now has the opportunity to capitalize on his sudden fame. Meanwhile, Creed is still smarting from nearly losing to some palooka no one has ever heard of, and arrogantly prods his newfound nemesis into getting back into the ring.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rocky III
AMC.HD.us2.description: Following his crushing defeat by Clubber Lang, Rocky Balboa joins forces with Apollo Creed in an effort to regain his title.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Top Gun: Maverick
AMC.HD.us2.description: After more than 30 years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. Training a detachment of graduates for a special assignment, Maverick must confront the ghosts of his past and his deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who choose to fly it.

AMC.HD.us2.title: American Sniper
AMC.HD.us2.description: U.S. Navy SEAL Chris Kyle (Bradley Cooper) takes his sole mission -- protect his comrades -- to heart and becomes one of the most lethal snipers in American history. His pinpoint accuracy not only saves countless lives but also makes him a prime target of insurgents. Despite grave danger and his struggle to be a good husband and father to his family back in the States, Kyle serves four tours of duty in Iraq. However, when he finally returns home, he finds that he cannot leave the war behind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: U.S. Marshals
AMC.HD.us2.description: An airplane bearing gruff U.S. Marshal Sam Gerard (Tommy Lee Jones) crashes in the wilderness. On board the same flight is Mark Sheridan (Wesley Snipes), a federal prisoner accused of double murder, who escapes during the ensuing chaos, but not before rescuing several people from the wreckage. Gerard is ordered to hunt down the fugitive along with State Department agent John Royce (Robert Downey Jr.), and the two pursue Sheridan relentlessly, despite growing doubts about his guilt.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Zero Dark Thirty
AMC.HD.us2.description: Following the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001, Osama bin Laden becomes one of the most-wanted men on the planet. The worldwide manhunt for the terrorist leader occupies the resources and attention of two U.S. presidential administrations. Ultimately, it is the work of a dedicated female operative (Jessica Chastain) that proves instrumental in finally locating bin Laden. In May 2011, Navy SEALs launch a nighttime strike, killing bin Laden in his compound in Abbottabad, Pakistan.

AMC.HD.us2.title: American Sniper
AMC.HD.us2.description: U.S. Navy SEAL Chris Kyle (Bradley Cooper) takes his sole mission -- protect his comrades -- to heart and becomes one of the most lethal snipers in American history. His pinpoint accuracy not only saves countless lives but also makes him a prime target of insurgents. Despite grave danger and his struggle to be a good husband and father to his family back in the States, Kyle serves four tours of duty in Iraq. However, when he finally returns home, he finds that he cannot leave the war behind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard
AMC.HD.us2.description: New York City policeman John McClane is visiting his estranged wife and two daughters on Christmas Eve. He joins her at a holiday party in the headquarters of the Japanese-owned business she works for. But the festivities are interrupted by a group of terrorists who take over the exclusive high-rise, and everyone in it. Very soon McClane realizes that there's no one to save the hostages -- but him.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard 2
AMC.HD.us2.description: A year after his heroics in L.A., detective John McClane (Bruce Willis) is mixed up in another terrorist plot, this time at Washington Dulles International Airport, where he is waiting for his wife (Bonnie Bedelia). That same night, South American politico and drug profiteer Ramon Esperanza (Franco Nero) is arriving in U.S. custody. McClane takes action when a treasonous ex-colonel (William Sadler) seizes control of the airport, threatening to crash every inbound flight unless Esperanza is freed.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Top Gun: Maverick
AMC.HD.us2.description: After more than 30 years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. Training a detachment of graduates for a special assignment, Maverick must confront the ghosts of his past and his deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who choose to fly it.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Dark Knight Rises
AMC.HD.us2.description: It has been eight years since Batman (Christian Bale), in collusion with Commissioner Gordon (Gary Oldman), vanished into the night. Assuming responsibility for the death of Harvey Dent, Batman sacrificed everything for what he and Gordon hoped would be the greater good. However, the arrival of a cunning cat burglar (Anne Hathaway) and a merciless terrorist named Bane (Tom Hardy) force Batman out of exile and into a battle he may not be able to win.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Shawshank Redemption
AMC.HD.us2.description: Andy Dufresne (Tim Robbins) is sentenced to two consecutive life terms in prison for the murders of his wife and her lover and is sentenced to a tough prison. However, only Andy knows he didn't commit the crimes. While there, he forms a friendship with Red (Morgan Freeman), experiences brutality of prison life, adapts, helps the warden, etc., all in 19 years.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Air Force One
AMC.HD.us2.description: After making a speech in Moscow vowing to never negotiate with terrorists, President James Marshall boards Air Force One with his family and advisers. When a group of terrorists led by Ivan Korshunov hijacks the flight, the President's principles are put to the test. Feigning escape, ex-solider Marshall stows away in the aircraft and must race against time to rescue his family and everyone else on board.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Red
AMC.HD.us2.description: After surviving an assault from a squad of hit men, retired CIA agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) reassembles his old team for an all-out war. Frank reunites with old Joe (Morgan Freeman), crazy Marvin (John Malkovich) and wily Victoria (Helen Mirren) to uncover a massive conspiracy that threatens their lives. Only their expert training will allow them to survive a near-impossible mission -- breaking into CIA headquarters.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Red 2
AMC.HD.us2.description: Former CIA black-ops agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) and his old partner, Marvin Boggs (John Malkovich), are caught in the grip of retirement -- but that soon changes when a powerful Cold War weapon known as Nightshade resurfaces decades after its disappearance. With assassins hot on their trail, Frank and his team set out to find the one scientist (Anthony Hopkins) who can unravel the mystery of Nightshade and help them save themselves -- and the world.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Dark Knight Rises
AMC.HD.us2.description: It has been eight years since Batman (Christian Bale), in collusion with Commissioner Gordon (Gary Oldman), vanished into the night. Assuming responsibility for the death of Harvey Dent, Batman sacrificed everything for what he and Gordon hoped would be the greater good. However, the arrival of a cunning cat burglar (Anne Hathaway) and a merciless terrorist named Bane (Tom Hardy) force Batman out of exile and into a battle he may not be able to win.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Shawshank Redemption
AMC.HD.us2.description: Andy Dufresne (Tim Robbins) is sentenced to two consecutive life terms in prison for the murders of his wife and her lover and is sentenced to a tough prison. However, only Andy knows he didn't commit the crimes. While there, he forms a friendship with Red (Morgan Freeman), experiences brutality of prison life, adapts, helps the warden, etc., all in 19 years.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Enemy of the State
AMC.HD.us2.description: Corrupt National Security Agency official Thomas Reynolds (Jon Voight) has a congressman assassinated to assure the passage of expansive new surveillance legislation. When a videotape of the murder ends up in the hands of Robert Clayton Dean (Will Smith), a labor lawyer and dedicated family man, he is framed for murder. With the help of ex-intelligence agent Edward "Brill" Lyle (Gene Hackman), Dean attempts to throw Reynolds off his trail and prove his innocence.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Audacity
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Foundering
AMC.HD.us2.description: Is Xander a hero or a villain?; Duncan is ready to disrupt with P.I.N.A.T.A.; JoAnne contends with the consequences of her counsel; Anushka takes the lead and Martin has a decision to make; Gary gets to the root of Orson's strange behaviour.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Audacity
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Foundering
AMC.HD.us2.description: Is Xander a hero or a villain?; Duncan is ready to disrupt with P.I.N.A.T.A.; JoAnne contends with the consequences of her counsel; Anushka takes the lead and Martin has a decision to make; Gary gets to the root of Orson's strange behaviour.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Italian Job
AMC.HD.us2.description: After a heist in Venice, Steve turns on his partners in crime, killing safecracker John Bridger and keeping all the gold for himself; the rest of the team, including leader Charlie Croker, driver Handsome Rob, explosives man Left Ear and tech geek Lyle, vows revenge; they enlist the help of Bridger's daughter, Stella and plot to recover the gold from Steve's Los Angeles mansion.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Audacity
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Foundering
AMC.HD.us2.description: Is Xander a hero or a villain?; Duncan is ready to disrupt with P.I.N.A.T.A.; JoAnne contends with the consequences of her counsel; Anushka takes the lead and Martin has a decision to make; Gary gets to the root of Orson's strange behaviour.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Olympus Has Fallen
AMC.HD.us2.description: The unthinkable happens when heavily armed and highly trained terrorists launch a bold daytime attack on the White House. The building is overrun, and President Benjamin Asher (Aaron Eckhart) and his staff are taken hostage. Luckily for Asher, former presidential security officer Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) is on the scene. With time running out, it's up to Banning to locate Asher's son before the extremists do and rescue the president before his captors unleash their ultimate plan.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Three Little Beers
AMC.HD.us2.description: The trio tries golf.

AMC.HD.us2.title: First Blood
AMC.HD.us2.description: Vietnam veteran and drifter John J. Rambo wanders into a small Washington town in search of an old friend, but is met with intolerance and brutality by the local sheriff, Will Teasle. When Teasle and his deputies restrain and shave Rambo, he flashes back to his time as a prisoner of war and unleashes his fury on the officers. He narrowly escapes the manhunt, but it will take his former commander to save the hunters from the hunted.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Fury
AMC.HD.us2.description: In April 1945, the Allies are making their final push in the European theater. A battle-hardened Army sergeant named Don "Wardaddy" Collier, leading a Sherman tank and a five-man crew, undertakes a deadly mission behind enemy lines. Hopelessly outnumbered, outgunned and saddled with an inexperienced soldier in their midst, Wardaddy and his men face overwhelming odds as they move to strike at the heart of Nazi Germany.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Currahee
AMC.HD.us2.description: A rivalry blazes between Lt. Sobel and a junior officer who has earned the respect of the men in Easy Company.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Day of Days
AMC.HD.us2.description: Thousands of paratroopers cross the English Channel to France on D-Day; Lt. Winters leads an attack on a fortified German artillery position.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Carentan
AMC.HD.us2.description: Easy Company sustains casualties while waging battle in Normandy; Pvt. Blithe has trouble adjusting to combat; the company returns to England.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Replacements
AMC.HD.us2.description: A fresh group of paratroopers joins Easy Company shortly before it parachutes into German-occupied Holland; the company has to retreat when it meets a superior force.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Crossroads
AMC.HD.us2.description: Winters leads a dangerous mission on a Dutch dike; although ill-equipped, Easy Company races to help hold the Allied line in the Ardennes Forest.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Bastogne
AMC.HD.us2.description: Easy Company spends Christmas in the trenches while trying to hold the line in the forest outside Bastogne, Belgium.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: The Breaking Point
AMC.HD.us2.description: After taking Bastogne, Belgium, the company moves on to the town of Foy, where many lives are lost as a result of Lt. Dike's incompetence.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: The Last Patrol
AMC.HD.us2.description: Lt. Jones leads a patrol across a river to take enemy prisoners, but the loss of a paratrooper leads Winters to refuse to send another patrol the next night.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Why We Fight
AMC.HD.us2.description: Easy Company enters Germany and discovers an abandoned Nazi concentration camp occupied by emaciated prisoners, just as the local citizens learn that Hitler is dead.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Band of Brothers
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Points
AMC.HD.us2.description: After capturing Eagle's Nest, Hitler's mountaintop fortress, the men of Easy Company face deployment to the Pacific.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hermanos enemigos; Agua bendita
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Señalan a Juan de participar en el secuestro y muerte de una parte de la familia de Abel. Debby subasta el agua de unos baños que se dio y su amigo Josué le exige la mitad del dinero ganado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de nacos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de San Valentín
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de los 70's
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de safari
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se solicita empleo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis es un hombre soberbio que renuncia a su empleo por considerase superior. Un error que le cuesta caro porque su esposa Teresa está embarazada y podrían perderlo todo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aprovechada y ratera, esa es mi nuera
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hija de Ana le reclama por aceptar que su hermano llevara a su pareja a vivir con ellos, sin exigirles que contribuyeran con los gastos. Ahora la nuera se fue y se llevó los muebles.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Odio y desalojo; The Gold Digger
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Quiere desalojarlos por conflictivos, ellos creen que los discrimina. Mirela llega a un acuerdo con José para quedarse con la pensión de su padre, pero el plan se cae cuando aparece la viuda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La recompensa; Bendita sea mi padre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Su esposo es el ladrón y ella quiere la recompensa que ofrecen por su captura. Marina se entera de que un cura demostró que es su padre y obtuvo su custodia, quiera llevársela a Panamá.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Todo tiene remedio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Beto, el hijo de Damián y Carla, tiene un tumor cerebral y necesita una cirugía. Su padre es despedido y ante la desesperación está a punto de robar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La mujer de blanco
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Norma quiere ser enfermera pero su tía no está de acuerdo, ya que considera que esa no es una carrera e insiste en que debe estudiar leyes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No hay amor más grande
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Memo rechaza el trasplante de riñón y necesita una nueva cirugía. Sus padres viven una crisis de pareja y están desesperados por la situación de su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cielo: Un cambio de ruta inesperado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cielo cae en manos de una red del crimen organizado tras reunirse con Mauricio, su exnovio, quien se convierte en el principal sospechoso. La madre de la joven, con ayuda, logra encontrarla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Monse: Si me engañas, te mato o me mato
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los celos de Monse se descontrolan cuando su esposo recibe un ascenso y una nueva asistente. Ella recae en la bebida y él se convierte en víctima de violencia, necesita ayuda profesional.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La pasión de Isabel y Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aunque Diego quiere alejar a Isabel de sus planes, ella tiene su futuro claro, no va a separarse de él. Gavino está impaciente y mueve fichas para acabar con Circe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El que nada sabe, nada teme
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Berenice y César cultivan un hermoso jardín para ganar una cocina integral. Ricardo y Aldo deben afrontar un desafío como superhéroes para poder escaparse con un automóvil.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El video
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Naomi fue atacada por Elena y las imágenes se hicieron virales. Ahora que sabe que su agresora también sufre, reconoce que las cosas no son siempre lo que parecen, o lo que se sube a las redes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá se humilla por un hombre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariana se preocupa mucho por su mamá. Ve que Juana se aferra a la relación con su papá, incluso sabiendo de las infidelidades y el maltrato. Juana pierde su autoestima, pero no quiere dejarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se aprovechó de mi enfermedad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Saraí denuncia maltratos por parte de su madre y asegura que les pidió dinero a los vecinos para pagar su funeral cuando ella estuvo hospitalizada, tras ser diagnosticada con cáncer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Disputa porcina; No soy judía
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Atropella a un cerdo en la calle y lo cocina, Dayamit dice que era su mascota. Livi escapó con su dote de 60 mil dólares, la madre quiere que la devuelva si no se casa, pero ella ya la usó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Anguila peligrosa; Sexo laboral
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Abraham e Iruan se enfrentan por el contrabando de anguilas. No quiere pagar por la muerte de su empleado porque dice que en ese momento no trabajaba, sino que tenía sexo con su esposo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aguanto su infidelidad por mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia descubre la traición de Enmanuel y no puede hacer nada por la seguridad de sus dos hijos. Leonor, su suegra, defiende a capa y espada a su hijo. Aparece Frida para despejar dudas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Regresa el aprendiz
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito va por Gavino a Babel y se arma una balacera. Cuando está a punto de matar al capo, sucede algo inesperado que cambia su destino. Diego logra que Circe siga creyendo en él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hermano abusa a hermano; Universidad de influencers
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Anthony exige que su hermano Edgard le pague por haberlo violado. Una madre se niega a entregarle dinero a su hijo para sus estudios, ella alega que no escogió una carrera profesional.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Maldad en la sangre; Niña loca por amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Natalia quiere la custodia de su sobrina abusada por la pareja de su hermana. Rosa, recuperada de su enfermedad, regresa de un viaje y descubre que su hija está enamorada de su padrastro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: ¿Será cierto que el amor existe desde los tiempos de las cavernas? En este episodio especial de cavernícolas, los concursantes intentan responder el interrogante, mientras buscan a su pareja ideal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de niños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El misterio de la astrología y los secretos del amor se unen en el primer programa de citas guiado por los astros.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dinamarca; Traición en moto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liz y Joan tienen una hija albina, a quien le afecta vivir en Miami por su condición, la madre quiere irse del país. Bárbara exige que Rafael y Ambert paguen por robarle sus clientes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Una Pura y Dos Con Sal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hija de un mujeriego regresa después de 15 años de ausencia e intenta reunirlo con su madre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vigilancia conflictiva; Santero saca demonio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rafael no puede acercarse a su hija, pero viola la restricción para salvarle la vida. Yerandys le hace sexo oral a sus clientas para librarlas de un espíritu maligno, Jacky se niega a pagarle.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mujeres al ataque
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lucero y Viridiana podrían duplicar sus premios si superan la prueba del hámster vaquero dentro de la jaula. René y Fernando tienen que rescatar a una princesa para poder ganar un automóvil.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Duplo golpe emocional; Balines contra iguanas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Verónica siente que su hermana la estafó emocionalmente, incitándola a enamorarse de una amiga con quien tenía un acuerdo de sacarle todo el dinero posible. La hermana alega que nada fue premeditado. Benjamín odia a las iguanas y a los indocumentados. El estado de Florida permite dispararle a las iguanas con rifles de balines y él, alegando que le estaba disparando a una iguana, le pegó un tiro en un ojo a Iván, quién, casualmente, es indocumentado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Rumbo al Mundial: Objetivo 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En la quinta edición de "Rumbo al Mundial: Objetivo 2026", se sigue recorriendo el panorama del fútbol internacional con la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 bien cerca.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Todo por ella; Permiso zoológico
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joan tiene la custodia total de su hija y Yuri descubre que la niña hace videos de "autobullying". En otro caso, la serpiente de Ángel y Rose se come al lindo perro de su vecina Katiana.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aguanto su infidelidad por mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia descubre la traición de Enmanuel y no puede hacer nada por la seguridad de sus dos hijos. Leonor, su suegra, defiende a capa y espada a su hijo. Aparece Frida para despejar dudas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Preñada del engaño
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Irving descubre que el hijo de su esposa no es suyo y quiere anular el matrimonio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me cambió por una exhibicionista
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cristian celebra su despedida de soltero con una exhibicionista y, tras la experiencia, cancela su boda con Nancy. Aunque ella lo perdona y espera su regreso, él la considera aburrida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Traigo la sangre caliente
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: A pesar de que Pablo es un jugador, Susana decide huir con él, porque lo ama, contra la oposición de su hermano. En una partida, Pablo lo pierde todo y le proponen apostar a su mujer. Él decide abandonar esa vida, sin imaginar lo que le espera.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Psicópata o profesional; La terraplanista
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ana es psicóloga y demanda a la paciente que le hizo perder su licencia profesional. María pide la custodia de su hijo y 20 mil dólares, porque su exesposo lo afecta con ideas de terraplanismo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El funeral de Bartolo; Wonder woman
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gisela pide una orden de alejamiento y 15 mil dólares de María, la sobrina de su esposo recién fallecido. Alejandro dice que Noel, quien participó con él en un concurso, le dio estimulantes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Capos de la mafia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ellas los prefieren chaparritos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las participantes intentan encontrar el amor verdadero entre hombres que tienen algo en común: son todos chaparritos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de piratas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Penélope Menchaca narra una historia de piratas en la que los protagonistas emiten los sonidos más apropiados para la ocasión. ¿Encontrarán los concursantes el tan preciado botín?

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vaping; Invasión dominicana
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hermana menor de edad de Dora enferma por un vaporizador, decide demandar al vendedor. Tonny, un estadounidense, se casa con una dominicana y ella se lleva a toda su familia a la casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Una Leyenda de Amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dos jóvenes enamorados agravan la rivalidad entre sus respectivas familias, enemistadas durante tres generaciones.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Premier League: Extra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la información que buscas antes y después de cada jornada en Premier League: análisis previo, datos clave, protagonistas y el mejor repaso tras los partidos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Premier League
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la acción de la jornada 38 de la temporada regular 2025-26 de la Premier League. West Ham United se enfrenta al Leeds United. Desde el Estadio de Londres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Premier League: 3er tiempo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Revive los goles y las mejores jugadas de cada jornada. Disfruta el análisis y escucha las reacciones de los protagonistas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tormento
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel no puede superar la pérdida de su nieto Rodrigo y vive atormentado por la culpa hasta que Diego llega a su vida. La necesidad de Daniel de volver a ser abuelo lo lleva a tomar la peor decisión.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aguanto su infidelidad por mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia descubre la traición de Enmanuel y no puede hacer nada por la seguridad de sus dos hijos. Leonor, su suegra, defiende a capa y espada a su hijo. Aparece Frida para despejar dudas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me cambió por una exhibicionista
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cristian celebra su despedida de soltero con una exhibicionista y, tras la experiencia, cancela su boda con Nancy. Aunque ella lo perdona y espera su regreso, él la considera aburrida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No más cruces para Cruz
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La doctora Ana María Polo interviene en batallas legales que afectan a los latinos. Como en una corte, las partes presentan testigos y evidencias para que ella emita su decisión. Además, expertos contribuyen con sus conocimientos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hijo tiene satiriasis; Mujeres histéricas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Martha tiene satiriasis, una enfermedad que provoca un desenfrenado deseo sexual. Milagros sufre histeria femenina y solo se calma con los masajes de su yerno, su hija está molesta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Responsabilidad de vacaciones; Sangre gitana
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Su marido muere por un malentendido, exige compensación. En la ceremonia del pañuelo comprueban que la novia no era virgen y se cancela la celebración, lo que provoca una deshonra a la familia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: La golondrina presumida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Una mujer de provincia rechaza a un ranchero por considerarlo de clase inferior. Él es un afortunado en los negocios, pero definitivamente un desafortunado en el amor.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lamento Borincano
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las frustraciones de un puertorriqueño que se muda a Nueva York en busca de fortuna.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muerte sin sentido; La miseria
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Susana le pide una compensación a Alex, quien se interpuso en una discusión de pareja y provocó la muerte de su esposo. Geidy quiere divorciarse de Roberto, y que él y su ex desalojen la casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vida de perros; Energía lunar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las dos perritas de Ingrid sufren de insuficiencia renal, su esposo quiere ponerlas a dormir. Laura tiene que pagar penalidad para salirse de una congregación que rinde culto a la Luna.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial playero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Honrarás a tus padres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Norma se hace pasar por una niña rica en la universidad y oculta su pasado. Ahora está a punto de casarse y se avergüenza de sus padres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aguanto su infidelidad por mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia descubre la traición de Enmanuel y no puede hacer nada por la seguridad de sus dos hijos. Leonor, su suegra, defiende a capa y espada a su hijo. Aparece Frida para despejar dudas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una vida por otra; Conejillo de indias
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La esposa de Armando está secuestrada por la guerrilla colombiana. Los secuestradores piden hacer un intercambio: exigen que se entregue al hijo de ella con uno de los jefes de la guerrilla y la liberan. Además, Ángel está obsesionado con ser parte de las pruebas de medicamentos que hacen las farmacéuticas. Vive de eso y lo ha sufrido porque perdió su erección en uno de los estudios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muerte digna; Mujer de dos caras
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roberto quiere suicidarse porque está enfermo, por eso planea dejar a su nieta con un amigo. Por otro lado, Jorge anhela divorciarse, alega que su esposa lo engañó ocultando lo fea que es.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Torta bajo el brazo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diego pierde su trabajo y decide hipotecar su casa para montar un negocio. Su esposa no está muy de acuerdo ya que le preocupa perderlo todo ahora que está embarazada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cuando llegue el alba
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Saúl tiene un cáncer terminal, pero a su hija solo le preocupa el dinero. Él y su amigo Nacho escriben una lista de cosas para hacer antes de que llegue el alba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hijo está vivo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elisa está convencida de que su hijo está vivo a pesar de que los médicos le dijeron que había muerto al nacer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ana: ¿Cuánto vales, cuánto ganas?
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ana se casa con Marco, quien no la deja ni estudiar, ni trabajar. Cuando la situación económica se pone difícil, ella sale embarazada y él tiene la excusa perfecta para que no busque un empleo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Alondra: Tú sí me representas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paula y Alondra, dos amigas con intereses distintos que se alejaron hasta enemistarse, se reúnen de nuevo cuando Sofi, la hermana de Paula, es secuestrada por una banda de trata de personas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Regresa el aprendiz
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito va por Gavino a Babel y se arma una balacera. Cuando está a punto de matar al capo, sucede algo inesperado que cambia su destino. Diego logra que Circe siga creyendo en él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Independizándonos de mamá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los hermanos Ricardo y Roberto necesitan el dinero en efectivo para mudarse de la casa de su madre. Ana y Andrés busca superar un reto divertido para llevarse una recámara infantil.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sospecha
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La excelencia de Érika como abogada penalista se pone a prueba cuando la muerte, personificada en Ella, la visita y le da 24 horas para vivir, a menos que resuelva un caso pendiente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los sugar también tenemos corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan no quiere que su hermana Rebeca se entrometa en su vida, ella le reclama porque busca mujeres mucho más jóvenes que él, les da dinero y luego le son infieles, incluso hasta con su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Alquilé mi vientre, pero me enamoré
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Edgar vive con su novia y, de común acuerdo, le propone a Carmen embarazarla a cambio de dinero. Ahora ella quiere convertirse en su esposa y lo presiona con la posibilidad de perder al bebé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mensaje fatal; El golazo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lorena demanda a Claudia por tenderle una trampa que pone en peligro su asilo. Amanda se enamora del hijo de su amante, y tienen un bebé juntos, pero ahora la abuela no reconoce a su nieto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Devuélveme mi pene; Millonario part time
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pía culpa a su sicóloga, también transgénero, de haberla manipulado para cambiarse de sexo. Anselmo se hace pasar por millonario para enamorar a Claudia, quien es rica, por eso lo despiden.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La crie y me acusa con su papá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Víctor se hace cargo de su hijastra Fátima desde niña. La relación se deteriora porque asegura que la tienen como una criada. Esto provoca una batalla entre su papá biológico y su padrastro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Diego en las garras de Circe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe sigue pensando que Diego está bajo su control e intenta seducirlo, pero algo se le sale de las manos. Joselito cae en manos de los federales y Gavino pide su cabeza. Arrestan a Jim.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Familia en deportación; Abuela momia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Álvaro y su familia viven una tragedia migratoria, la esposa tiene orden de deportación y él quiere hacer algo. Por otro lado, Alex encuentra una momia, le toma fotos y las usa para publicidad.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga Talking Football
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Luis de la Fuente
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Una conversación con personalidades relacionadas con LaLiga para hablar de fútbol. El campeonato español cuenta con una nómina de estrellas que son referencia de este deporte. Es por eso, sin duda, que es uno de los más seguidos de todo el planeta.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Liga italiana
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Fiorentina-Atalanta

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Elche-Getafe
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.
